PROJECT.NAME: ihAphHill11-mito
PROJECT.TITLE: Aphis hillerislambersi, mitochondrial assembly, ihAphHill11-mito.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project collects the mitochondrial assembly of Aphis hillerislambersi. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).
